creator: bsam@ipt.ru
text:
Hello, Dmitry!

Can you please investigate it, running at a 6.x tinderbox shows a
plist error:

Registering depends: guile-1.6.7_1 libltdl-1.5.22.
Creating bzip'd tar ball in '/tmp/packages/All/freeipmi-0.2.3.tbz'
